All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

P

paintComponent(Graphics) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Canvas
Paints all components and connectors.
Palette - Class in UserInterfaceLayer
Palette panel for the circuit design application.
Palette() - Constructor for class UserInterfaceLayer.Palette
Constructs the Palette panel.
Pin - Class in BusinessLayer
Represents an input or output pin on a digital component.
Pin(int, int, Pin.PinType, Component) - Constructor for class BusinessLayer.Pin
Constructs a Pin at the given position, with type and owner component.
Pin.PinType - Enum Class in BusinessLayer
Type of pin: INPUT or OUTPUT.
Project - Class in BusinessLayer
Represents a digital project consisting of multiple circuits.
Project() - Constructor for class BusinessLayer.Project
Constructs a new Project with a default initial circuit ("Circuit 1").
projectNames() - Method in class DataAccessLayer.DataStorage
Retrieves the names of all projects stored in the database.
projectNames() - Method in interface DataAccessLayer.Storage
Retrieves the list of all project names available in storage.
propagate() - Method in class BusinessLayer.Connector
Propagate value from source pin to target pin.
propagateFrom(Component) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Circuit
Propagates signals starting from a specific component.
